title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.020 - Summons and writs to be served on executive director
text:
103.020.  Summons and writs to be served on executive director. — Any summons or other writ issued by the courts of the state shall be served upon the executive director.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 1 subsec. 10)
